MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT EDUARDO ALEGRETT MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Settlement on file. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alex Merchant, 415.294.4111 for Plaintiff Eduardo Alegrett. (Court call)
Stanislav Reznitskly, 415.627.8089 Defendant in Pro Per. Defendant was assisted by Alexander
Reznitskly with Russian interpretation. A. Reznitskly was given the interpreters oath.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STANISLAV REZNITSKIY, ELEONORA ERMOLOVA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises issues of fact that cannot be addressed at this stage of the litigation. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
